domain.description: Configure the domain and web address of your store

domain.dnsStep1: 1. Add a CNAME record in your domain DNS settings
domain.dnsStep3: 3. Wait for DNS propagation (can take up to 48 hours)

advanced.title: Advanced settings
advanced.description: Advanced configuration options for your store
advanced.maintenanceHint: Visitors will see a maintenance page. You can still access the admin area.

advanced.googleAnalyticsHint: Track your store visitors with Google Analytics

advanced.customHeadCodeHint: Code to insert before the </head> tag
advanced.customBodyCodeHint: Code to insert before the </body> tag
advanced.allowIndexingHint: Allow search engines like Google to index your store
advanced.apiKeyHint: Use this key to access the store API

advanced.lazyLoadingHint: Load images only when they become visible
advanced.forceHttpsHint: Redirect all HTTP traffic to HTTPS
advanced.rateLimitingHint: Limit API requests to prevent abuse
advanced.autoBackupHint: Automatically create backups of your store data
advanced.exportHint: Download all your store data as JSON
advanced.deleteStoreWarning: ⚠️ Warning: This action cannot be undone!
advanced.deleteStoreHint: Permanently delete the store and all associated data

aiGenerator.intro: AI Product Image Analysis: Upload multiple product photos and AI automatically generates product data.

aiGenerator.step2: 🤖 AI analyzes each image automatically (multilingual: de/en/ar)

aiGenerator.hintText: Select the desired images (checkbox top left). These will be saved as products in your store.

email.footerSupport: For questions contact us at support@markt.ma
email.footerUnsubscribe: You are receiving this email because you have an account at Markt.ma.

verification.subject: Verify your email address - Markt.ma
verification.title: Verify Your Email
verification.intro: Welcome to Markt.ma! Please verify your email address to activate your account.
verification.ignore: If you did not create an account, please ignore this email.

welcome.subject: Welcome to Markt.ma – Your email has been verified!
welcome.title: Welcome to Markt.ma!
welcome.intro: Your email address has been successfully verified. You can now log in and enjoy all features.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password - Markt.ma
passwordReset.title: Reset Your Password
passwordReset.intro: We received a request to reset your password.
passwordReset.ignore: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email. Your password will remain unchanged.

passwordChanged.subject: Your password has been changed - Markt.ma
passwordChanged.title: Password Successfully Changed
passwordChanged.intro: Your password has been successfully changed.
passwordChanged.warning: If you did not make this change, please contact our support immediately.

orderConfirmation.subject: Order Confirmation #{{orderNumber}} - {{storeName}}
orderConfirmation.title: Order Confirmed!
orderConfirmation.intro: Thank you for your order! We have received it and are processing it.
orderConfirmation.outro: You will receive another email once your order has been shipped.

shipping.subject: Your Order #{{orderNumber}} Has Been Shipped - {{storeName}}
shipping.title: Your Order Is On Its Way!
shipping.intro: Great news! Your order has been shipped.
shipping.outro: Your package should arrive within the next few days.
shipping.noTracking: Tracking information will be available shortly.

delivery.subject: Your Order #{{orderNumber}} Has Been Delivered - {{storeName}}
delivery.title: Order Successfully Delivered!
delivery.intro: Your order has been successfully delivered. We hope you are satisfied!
delivery.rating: How was your experience? Leave a review!

cancellation.subject: Order #{{orderNumber}} Cancelled - {{storeName}}
cancellation.title: Order Cancelled
cancellation.outro: If you have questions about the cancellation, please contact our support.

reminder.subject: Your subscription renews in {{daysLeft}} days
reminder.title: Your subscription renews soon
reminder.intro: Your subscription will renew automatically. Here are the details:
reminder.outro: You can cancel anytime in your account.

renewed.subject: Your {{planName}} subscription has been renewed
renewed.title: Subscription renewed
renewed.intro: Your subscription has been renewed successfully.
renewed.outro: Thank you for staying with us!

expired.subject: Your {{planName}} subscription has expired
expired.title: Subscription expired
expired.intro: Your subscription has expired. You have been moved to the Free plan.
expired.outro: You can re-activate anytime to regain premium features.

cancelled.subject: Your {{planName}} subscription has been cancelled
cancelled.title: Subscription cancelled
cancelled.intro: Your subscription has been cancelled as requested.
cancelled.outro: We'd love to have you back anytime!

upgraded.subject: Welcome to {{newPlanName}}!
upgraded.title: Welcome to {{newPlanName}}!
upgraded.intro: Your subscription has been upgraded successfully.

abandoned.subject: You left {{itemCount}} items in your cart - {{storeName}}
abandoned.title: Your cart is waiting for you
abandoned.intro: We noticed you left some items in your cart. Complete your purchase before they sell out!
abandoned.outro: This cart will be cleared automatically after 7 days.

storeAccess.subject: Your store "{{storeName}}" is live 🚀 – markt.ma
storeAccess.title: Your store is ready!
storeAccess.intro: Your store is now live. Save this email – it contains your direct link to the dashboard and your store URL.
storeAccess.tip: Tip: Save this email. It contains your direct access link to your store dashboard.
